name: 文件哈希计算器
description: 浏览器端文件哈希计算工具，支持 SHA-1/SHA-256/SHA-384/SHA-512

icons.src: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 512 512'><rect x='64' y='32' width='384' height='448' rx='32' fill='%23faebd7' stroke='%23ccc' stroke-width='20'/><text x='256' y='350' font-size='220' font-family='monospace' font-weight='bold' text-anchor='middle' fill='%23555'>H</text></svg>
